briefdescription.para: Pointer to data descriptor.
Problem domain.
Grids defined at this level.
Time variable assoc with new data.
Time variable assoc with old data.
Pointer to new-time data.
Pointer to previous time data.
Arena we should use for allocating the data.
This is used as a temporary collection of FabArray header names written during a checkpoint.
This is used to store preread FabArray headers.
The default constructor.

memberdef.argsstring: (const Box &p_domain, const BoxArray &grds, const DistributionMapping &dm, const StateDescriptor *d, Real cur_time, Real dt, const FabFactory< FArrayBox > &factory)
memberdef.name: StateData

briefdescription.para: Construct and allocate state storage for a level.

parameterdescription.para: Domain box of the AMR problem (used for BCs).
Cell-centered BoxArray for this level.
Distribution mapping describing ownership of grids.
State descriptor providing metadata (components, BCs, etc.).
Current simulation time.
Initial time step (dt_old = dt_new = dt).
Fab factory controlling allocation (EB-aware, etc.).

briefdescription.para: The destructor.
Move constructor; transfers ownership of stored MultiFabs and metadata.
Copy-assignment; deep-copies metadata and allocates new FAB storage.
Copy construction is disabled to avoid ambiguous ownership of state buffers.
Move assignment is disabled (use define()/swap helpers instead).

memberdef.argsstring: (const Box &p_domain, const BoxArray &grds, const DistributionMapping &dm, const StateDescriptor &d, Real cur_time, Real dt, const FabFactory< FArrayBox > &factory)
memberdef.name: define

briefdescription.para: Initialize the object after default construction.

parameterdescription.para: Domain box of the AMR problem (used for BCs).
Cell-centered BoxArray for this level.
Distribution mapping for that grid layout.
State descriptor describing component layout.
Current simulation time.
Initial dt (applied to both old/new slots).
Fab factory used for allocation.

briefdescription.para: Copy the "old" time slice from state, allocating storage if needed.

parameterdescription.para: Source StateData whose old data/time level are cloned.

briefdescription.para: Copy the "new" time slice from state, allocating storage if needed.

parameterdescription.para: Source StateData whose new data/time level are cloned.

briefdescription.para: Allocates space for old timestep data.
Deletes the space used by the old timestep data.
Reverts back to initial state.
Old data becomes new data and new time is incremented by dt.

parameterdescription.para: Time step separating the old and new slots.

briefdescription.para: Swaps old data with a new MultiFab. Deletes the previous old data.

parameterdescription.para: MultiFab that will replace the stored old data (ownership transferred).

briefdescription.para: Swaps old data with another StateData. Does not delete the previous old data.

parameterdescription.para: Peer whose old data will be exchanged with this instance.

briefdescription.para: Swaps new data with a new MultiFab. Deletes the previous new data.

parameterdescription.para: MultiFab that will replace the stored new data (ownership transferred).

briefdescription.para: Swaps new data with another StateData. Does not delete the previous new data.

parameterdescription.para: Peer whose new data will be exchanged with this instance.

briefdescription.para: Sets time of old and new data.

parameterdescription.para: New-time value.
Dt associated with the old time interval.
Dt associated with the new time interval.

briefdescription.para: Sets time of old data.

parameterdescription.para: Old-time value to record.

briefdescription.para: Sets time of new data.

parameterdescription.para: New-time value to record.

briefdescription.para: Set both start/stop endpoints of the new-time interval to time.
Register the state data with a MultiFabCopyDescriptor for later interpolation/fills.

parameterdescription.para: Descriptor that tracks MultiFabs participating in copy/interp operations.
Output vector receiving identifiers for the registered MultiFabs.

memberdef.argsstring: (MultiFabCopyDescriptor &multiFabCopyDesc, Vector< MultiFabId > &mfid, BoxList *returnedUnfillableBoxes, Vector< FillBoxId > &returnedFillBoxIds, const Box &subbox, Real time, int src_comp, int dest_comp, int num_comp, bool extrap=false)
memberdef.name: InterpAddBox

briefdescription.para: Request interpolation/copied data covering subbox.

parameterdescription.para: Descriptor returned by RegisterData().
Identifiers previously produced by RegisterData().
Optional output list of boxes that could not be filled.
Output fill-box identifiers referencing queued requests.
Region that needs to be populated.
Physical time at which data should be sampled.
Source component index in the state data.
Destination component index inside the caller's buffers.
Number of components requested.
If true, allow extrapolation beyond old/new time intervals.

memberdef.argsstring: (MultiFabCopyDescriptor &fabCopyDesc, const Vector< MultiFabId > &mfid, const Vector< FillBoxId > &fillBoxIds, FArrayBox &dest, Real time, int src_comp, int dest_comp, int num_comp, bool extrap=false)
memberdef.name: InterpFillFab

briefdescription.para: Complete outstanding interpolation requests and fill dest.

parameterdescription.para: Descriptor produced by RegisterData().
Identifiers previously produced by RegisterData().
Identifiers returned by InterpAddBox().
Destination FAB.
Physical time at which data should be sampled.
Source component offset in the state data.
Destination component offset inside dest.
Number of components to fill.
If true, allow extrapolation beyond old/new time intervals.

memberdef.argsstring: (FArrayBox &dest, Real time, const Real *dx, const RealBox &prob_domain, int dest_comp, int src_comp, int num_comp=1)
memberdef.name: FillBoundary

briefdescription.para: Set physical boundary values for a FAB extracted from the MultiFab.

parameterdescription.para: Destination FAB to modify.
Physical time at which BCs are evaluated.
Cell spacing array.
Real-space domain extents.
Destination component offset in dest.
Source component offset in the state data.
Number of components to update (default 1).

memberdef.argsstring: (Box const &bx, FArrayBox &dest, Real time, Geometry const &geom, int dest_comp, int src_comp, int num_comp)
memberdef.name: FillBoundary

detaileddescription.para: Variant that fills data on region bx into dest at components starting dest_comp, sampling state components beginning at src_comp for num_comp values using geometry geom at time.

memberdef.argsstring: (const std::string &name, const std::string &fullpathname, std::ostream &os, VisMF::How how, bool dump_old=true)
memberdef.name: checkPoint

briefdescription.para: Write the state data to a checkpoint file.

parameterdescription.para: State name (prefix for component folders).
Directory that will hold the data.
Output stream for metadata.
VisMF write mode.
Whether to include the old-time slot.

memberdef.argsstring: (std::istream &is, const Box &p_domain, const BoxArray &grds, const DistributionMapping &dm, const FabFactory< FArrayBox > &factory, const StateDescriptor &d, const std::string &chkfile)
memberdef.name: restart

briefdescription.para: Restart with domain box, grids, and dmap provided.

parameterdescription.para: Input stream tied to the checkpoint data.
Domain box for the level.
Cell-centered grid layout.
Distribution mapping describing ownership of grids.
Fab factory controlling allocation strategy.
State descriptor describing components/BCs.
Name of the checkpoint file (for logging).

briefdescription.para: Initialize from another StateData sharing descriptor d.

parameterdescription.para: State descriptor describing the components.
Source data that will be cloned.

briefdescription.para: Returns the StateDescriptor.
Returns the valid domain.
Returns the BoxArray.
Replace the stored BoxArray layout with a_grids (no redistribution occurs).
Replace the stored DistributionMapping with new_dmap (no redistribution occurs).
Replace the internal factory with a clone of a_factory.
Returns the current time.
Returns the previous time.
Returns the new data.
Returns the new data.
Returns the old data.
Returns the old data.
Returns the FAB of new data at grid index i.
Returns the FAB of old data at grid index i.
Returns boundary conditions of specified component on the specified grid.

parameterdescription.para: Component index.
Grid index.

briefdescription.para: Prints out the time interval.

parameterdescription.para: Output stream receiving a textual summary of old/new times.

briefdescription.para: True if there is any old data available.
True if there is any new data available.

memberdef.argsstring: (Vector< MultiFab * > &data, Vector< Real > &datatime, Real time) const
memberdef.name: getData

briefdescription.para: Gather data pointers and their time stamps corresponding to time.

parameterdescription.para: Output list receiving pointers to MultiFabs.
Output list receiving the associated times.
Requested interpolation time.

briefdescription.para: Get the Arena used.
Set the Arena used for subsequent allocations to ar.
These facilitate prereading FabArray headers to avoid synchronization when reading multiple FabArrays.

detaileddescription.para: View of FabArray header filenames recorded during the last checkpoint write.

briefdescription.para: Clear the cached list of FabArray header names.
Install a pointer fahmp to the global map storing pre-read FabArray headers.
Internal helper that reads FAB headers/data from a checkpoint stream.
Current and previous level-time data.

detaileddescription.para: StateData holds state data on a level for the current and previous time step.
